search_user_hint: Type a name or key or paste a list of keys
search_multiuser_hint: Long press if you want to pay several users at once
intro_1_description: With this wallet, you can easily and securely store, send, and receive ẐEN usage tokens.
intro_2_title: A cooperative usage token for UPlanet members
intro_2_description: ẐEN is a usage token provided to UPlanet cooperative members. Transparent, fair, and eco-friendly.
intro_3_title: ẐEN runs on the UPlanet cooperative network
intro_3_description: UPlanet is a decentralized cooperative network enabling its members to exchange goods and services using ẐEN tokens.
intro_4_description: We'll help you create a ẐEN wallet to securely store your tokens on your device and transfer them to other members without intermediaries.
intro_5_description: Offer your services and products, receive payments in ẐEN, and purchase goods within the UPlanet cooperative.
show_qr_to_client: Show your public key to your client
show_qr_to_client_amount: Display this QR code with that amount to your client
keys_tooltip: Public and private keys work like a lock and key system. The public key acts as the lock that can be opened by anyone having the corresponding private key, providing a secure way to authenticate and verify transactions.
key_copied_to_clipboard: Your public key has been copied to the clipboard
some_key_copied_to_clipboard: The public key has been copied to the clipboard
no_transactions: This wallet has no balance. Start for example by offering your services in UPlanet markets in order to receive your first income.
dark_mode_desc: Use dark theme for the app
please_wait_deletion: Please wait before deleting another wallet
delete_wallet_error: Unable to delete wallet. Please try again.
expert_mode_desc: Enable advanced features and technical information
intro_pattern_to_import: Pattern you used to export your wallet
payment_successful_desc: The transaction will be effective in a few minutes.
please_confirm_sent_desc: Please confirm that you wish to send {amount} {currency} to {to}
please_confirm_retry_sent_desc: Please confirm that you wish to retry send {amount} {currency} to {to}
valid_comment: The comment cannot have accents or commas
search_limitation: The search term must have at least 3 characters
faq_0_title: How can I start using ẐEN and this wallet?
faq_0_desc: Begin by offering your services in UPlanet markets, such as to receive your first income. If you already have ẐEN in a legacy wallet, you can transfer some to this wallet and use it to send and receive ẐEN currency easily.
faq_1_title: Can I import my legacy wallet?
faq_1_desc: Yes, you can import a legacy wallet, it will ask for your password/passphrase on each use.
faq_2_desc: It is as secure as carrying a wallet or purse in your pocket. In other words, you use a regular bank card by taking it out of your pocket and entering a four-digit password. With this ẐEN wallet, it's pretty much the same thing. You take out your phone, unlock it typically with a four-digit PIN, and then you can operate this wallet. Therefore, you should be just as cautious as you are with your physical wallets and purses. If you delete this browser or app or lose your mobile device, you may lose your funds and not be able to recover them (unless you have an exported backup copy of your wallet).
faq_3_title: Why can't I add a password to the wallet?
faq_3_desc: First, adding nuclear suitcase-level security to a wallet of this type is a hassle. Second, people lose their passwords and funds all the time, which we wanted to avoid. Finally, although we could add something simpler like a PIN password or a pattern, people might repeat their mobile or credit card passwords, which could be disastrous. We believe it is safer this way.
faq_4_title: Why use something as literal as a credit card and a card reader?
faq_4_desc: Mainly, because we wanted to make the use of ẐEN simple for new people, and then, with use, make it easier to transition to using more advanced programs etc.
form_contact_name_validation_pub_key: Please enter a valid public key
payment_error_desc: Oops! the payment failed. More details: {error}
payment_error_retry: Oops! the payment failed. Please retry in some minutes.
error_installing_desktop: Error installing Ẑinkgo in your Desktop: (error: {error})
You can't send money to yourself.
allow_notifications_desc: Allow Ẑinkgo to notify you with new payments
notification_new_payment_desc: You have received a {amount} payment from {from}
browser_warning: You are using a browser we didn't test. Please use Chrome, Firefox or Brave.
no_nodes_found: We couldn't communicate with any node. Please try again later.
fetch_tx_error: Something went wrong while fetching your transactions.
creditCardKey_desc: Congratulations! You have successfully created your ẐEN wallet. Please note that everything is stored on this device, so make sure not to delete this application to avoid losing your wallet. In the info section you can make a backup of your wallet, in case your device has any issues and you need to access your wallet.
creditCardKey_web_desc: Congratulations! You have successfully created your ẐEN wallet. It is important to note that this wallet is stored only in your browser. Therefore, if you close the browser and open it again, make sure that the same wallet appears. If not, you may be using an unsupported browser. Remember that we also have an app. In the info section you can make a backup of your wallet, in case your device has any issues.
creditCardKey_button_desc: Please note that everything is stored on this device, so make sure not to delete this application to avoid losing your wallet. In the info section you can make a backup of your wallet, in case your device has any issues and you need to access your wallet.
creditCardKey_button_web_desc: It is important to note that this wallet is stored only in your browser. Therefore, if you close the browser and open it again, make sure that the same wallet appears. If not, you may be using an unsupported browser. Remember that we also have an app. In the info section you can make a backup of your wallet, in case your device has any issues.
creditCardPubKey_desc: This is the public address of your wallet (although this is the abbreviated version). You can copy it by tapping on it to share it with others.
paySearchUserKey_desc: From this section you can make payments in ẐEN. You can search for users on the network or scan QR codes to make your payments.
payAmountKey_desc: In this field you should indicate the amount you want to pay in ẐEN.
paySentKey_desc: Once you have indicated the payment amount, you only need to press the 'Send' button to make the payment. It is important to note that this wallet does not have a password, so it operates like a pocket wallet for quick transactions with small amounts.
receiveMainKey_desc: This works similarly to point of sale machines in stores, but instead of credit card payments, we use QR codes. Here you can generate QR codes for others to scan and make payments to you.
receiveQrKey_desc: On this screen you will find your own QR code that you can share with others to receive payments in ẐEN.
receiveAmountKey_desc: If you want to sell a product or service, you can generate a QR code with your public key and the amount to be charged in ẐEN.
receiveSumKey_desc: You can also generate a QR code with the total amount of a purchase by adding up the prices of the items you are selling.
contactsMainKey_desc: In this section you can save your most frequent contacts and scan QR codes from other people.
contactsQrKey_desc: Here you can scan QR codes from other people to add them to your contacts.
txMainKey_desc: Here you can see the history of your transactions. If your wallet is empty, to start using ẐEN, you can offer your services on markets or web platforms such as the UPlanet cooperative. If you already have ẐEN, you can transfer them to this Ẑinkgo wallet and start using it.
txBalanceKey_desc: On this screen you can see the current balance of your Ẑinkgo wallet.
txRefreshKey_desc: If you are waiting for a payment, you can press this button to refresh the screen. However, this wallet will also do it periodically for you and send you notifications of new payments.
infoMainKey_desc: Here you will find more information about your wallet and other options.
exportMainKey_desc: It is important that you make a backup of your wallet as soon as possible and keep it safe, so that you can import it into another browser or the app, or restore your wallet in case you lose your device.
feedback: Having issues? Give us more info!

export_ewif_format_description: Generates an encrypted WIF file, requiring a password to access your wallet. This is more secure but still handle with care!

auth_file_pubkey_mismatch: The public key in the file does not match or wrong password.

update_prompt: A newer version of Ẑinkgo is available. Would you like to update?
brave_warning_desc:
You are using Brave browser. Due to Brave Shields protection, your wallets may be deleted when you close the browser.

To prevent losing your funds:

1. Export your wallet regularly (Info section → Export wallet)
2. Disable Brave Shields for this site (click the lion icon in the address bar)
3. Consider using Chrome or Firefox for better compatibility

Please export your wallet now if you haven't already done so.
